title: Big Technology AI Summit (full): Greg Brockman, Mike Krieger, Aaron Levie & Friends of The Podcast
summary: The Big Technology AI Summit convened industry leaders including executives from OpenAI, Anthropic, Box, and Meta in June 2026 following a federal government action forcing Anthropic to withdraw its frontier models Fable and Mythos. Panels addressed infrastructure buildout, enterprise AI budgets, cybersecurity implications, and competing visions for AI's future between the US and China.
